headline: Phishing campaign targets payroll team
details: Staff members received urgent email messages asking them to verify payroll credentials through a login link. Multiple recipients reported similar wording.

headline: SMS scam impersonating bank support
details: Residents are receiving SMS messages that claim debit cards are blocked and ask users to share OTP on a callback number.

headline: Public notice mentions leaked customer records
details: A local retail chain posted an incident note saying customer contact records may have been exposed due to unauthorized database access.

headline: False outage restoration calls reported
details: Following an ISP outage, callers pretending to be technicians are asking for remote access and payment to restore internet services.

headline: Chemical storage warning for nearby block
details: City authority bulletin warns residents about a temporary chemical hazard near the industrial zone and advises route restrictions.
